problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
